title: rosa rubiginosa var. consanguinea
intro: Rosa rubiginosa var. consanguinea, also known as the dwarf sweetbriar rose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa rubiginosa var. consanguinea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Rosa rubiginosa var. consanguinea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, where it can be used to treat various health issues.
